name: Fry's Money Services
description_short: Fry's Money Services in Phoenix offers check cashing, money transfers, and wire services with wheelchair accessibility and on-site parking.
description_long:
Fry's Money Services operates as a financial services provider located in Phoenix, Arizona's North Daisy Mountain area. The business appears to be associated with Fry's Food Stores, a regional grocery chain, suggesting it may operate as an in-store financial services kiosk or standalone location. The company has established itself in the check-cashing and money transfer sector, which typically serves unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and fund transfer capabilities without traditional banking relationships.

The company's core service offerings include check cashing for immediate cash access, bank wire transfer services for remote money movement, and money order services for secure payment transmission. These services are standard in the check-cashing category and address fundamental financial needs for consumers who may lack traditional bank accounts or prefer alternative financial institutions. The services are designed to provide convenience and speed in accessing funds and sending money.

Fry's Money Services distinguishes itself through physical accessibility features, including wheelchair-accessible facilities, adapted parking for disabled patrons, and dedicated parking for all customers. These amenities reflect an explicit commitment to serving disabled and elderly consumers who may have mobility challenges. The on-site service delivery model, housed within what appears to be a larger retail environment, provides convenience for customers already shopping at the location.

The company currently has zero Google reviews, which limits independent verification of service quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction. No rating data is available to assess how well the company executes its stated services or how it compares to competitors. Without customer feedback, prospective users cannot verify claims about service speed, fees, or professionalism. The website provided is a Spanish-language directory listing rather than an official company site, raising questions about the completeness and currency of the business information.
pros: Wheelchair-accessible facility with adapted parking accommodates disabled and elderly customers
On-site services located within convenient retail environment (Fry's Food Stores location)
Offers three core financial services: check cashing, wire transfers, and money orders
Dedicated customer parking available on premises
Services in-house rather than requiring customers to visit separate financial institutions
Phone contact line (623-551-7220) available for customer inquiries
cons: Zero customer reviews on Google My Business limits ability to assess service quality or fees
No official company website—business information sourced from third-party Spanish-language directory
Phone number provided is outdated or inaccurate (leads to directory listing, not company)
No fee schedule, service times, or pricing information available to consumers
Limited online presence makes it difficult to verify current hours, services, or operational status
best_for: Customers already shopping at Fry's Food Stores locations who need check-cashing services
Disabled and elderly individuals needing wheelchair-accessible check cashing
People seeking convenient in-store money transfer and wire services
diagnosis: Fry's Money Services is best for consumers already using Fry's Food Stores who need basic check-cashing or money transfer services and value physical accessibility. The primary caveat is complete lack of customer reviews or independently verifiable information about fees, speed, or service quality—making this a higher-risk choice than established providers with transparent pricing and customer feedback.
